Amended MOTION FOR CHANGE OF VENUE
Off Calendar Apr-24-2024 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT WESTERN EXPRESS, INC. AND EDWIN JOHNSON'S Amended MOTION FOR CHANGE OF VENUE.

Moot due to stipulated transfer.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr., Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/rbu)

MOTION FOR CHANGE OF VENUE
Off Calendar Apr-22-2024 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances:
Atty. CLAUDE WYLE, Esq. of Choulos, Choulos & Wyle, LLP (tel: 415-474-7800) for Plaintiffs.
Atty. JOE YELDA, Esq. of Higgs Fletcher & Mack LLP (tel: 619-236-1551) for Defendants (via Zoom videoconference).

Hearing Re: DEFENDANT WESTERN EXPRESS, INC. AND EDWIN JOHNSON's MOTION FOR CHANGE OF VENUE.

Matter discussed. Counsel Claude Wyle informs the Court that an stipulation has been signed by the parties transferring the matter to Shasta County and Plaintiff would bear the cost of the transfer. Upon conclusion of discussion, the Court takes the matter off calendar. Counsel is to provide department 302 with the stipulation for the Court's signature.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr.; Clerk: V. Da Fonseca; Not reported. (302/RBU)
